content:
Create a markdown editor with live preview. Create these files in the current directory:
1. index.html - Split-pane layout: left side is a textarea editor, right side is live preview. Include a toolbar with buttons for Bold, Italic, Heading (H1-H3), Link, Image, Code block, Unordered list, Ordered list, Blockquote, Horizontal rule. Add an "Export HTML" button that downloads the rendered output.
2. style.css - Professional dark theme, responsive split panes with draggable resizer, syntax-highlighted toolbar, smooth transitions, styled preview matching GitHub markdown style.
3. markdown-parser.js - A complete markdown parser (no external libraries) that handles: headings (h1-h6), bold, italic, bold+italic, inline code, code blocks with language labels, links, images, unordered and ordered lists (including nested), blockquotes (including nested), horizontal rules, paragraphs, line breaks, and escape characters.
4. editor.js - Editor logic: real-time preview update on input, toolbar button actions that insert markdown syntax at cursor position (wrapping selected text if any), drag-to-resize split panes, keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+B bold, Ctrl+I italic, Ctrl+K link), localStorage auto-save/restore, and Export HTML functionality.

| 기능 | 상세 |

XSS via `javascript:` URI in Links and Images **Severity:** CRITICAL **Category:** A03:2021 - Injection (XSS) **Location:** `markdown-parser.js:59-61` (links), `markdown-parser.js:53-56` (images) **Exploitability:** Remote, unauthenticated -- any user typing or pasting markdown triggers it **Blast Radius:** Full DOM access, cookie theft, session hijacking, keylogging in the editor **Issue:** The link parser escapes HTML entities in `href` via `escapeHtml()`, which prevents attribute breakout (`"` -> `"`). Exported HTML File Contains Unsanitized User Content Without CSP **Severity:** HIGH **Category:** A03:2021 - Injection (XSS) **Location:** `editor.js:723-836` (`exportHtml` function, specifically line 833) **Exploitability:** Remote -- user exports HTML, shares or opens it, XSS triggers **Blast Radius:** Arbitrary script execution in any browser that opens the exported file **Issue:** The `exportHtml` function embeds `MarkdownParser.parse(markdownContent)` directly into a standalone HTML file at line 833. Regex Denial of Service (ReDoS) in Bold/Italic Patterns **Severity:** MEDIUM **Category:** A03:2021 - Injection **Location:** `markdown-parser.js:65-74` **Exploitability:** Local -- user types pathological input in editor **Blast Radius:** Browser tab freezes/hangs (UI denial of service) **Issue:** The non-greedy `.+?` patterns in bold/italic can cause catastrophic backtracking with pathological input. Combined with the parser XSS bugs, a poisoned localStorage value becomes a persistent XSS vector. **Remediation:** Fix the parser-level XSS bugs. The localStorage restore path itself is safe if the parser properly sanitizes output. --- ### 9. Fenced Code Block -- Unclosed Block Consumes All Remaining Input **Severity:** LOW **Category:** Parser Correctness Bug **Location:** `markdown-parser.js:220-236` **Exploitability:** N/A (correctness, not security) **Blast Radius:** All content after an unclosed ``` is silently swallowed into a code block **Issue:** In `parseCodeBlock`, if the closing ``` is never found, the `while` loop at line 224 runs to the end of the input. ${escapeHtml(lines[startIndex])}

`, nextIndex: startIndex + 1 }; } ``` --- ## Security Checklist - [x] No hardcoded secrets (no API keys, passwords, or tokens found) - [ ] **All inputs validated -- FAIL:** Raw HTML in markdown is not escaped before inline transforms - [ ] **Injection prevention verified -- FAIL:** `javascript:` URIs pass through to `href` attributes - [x] Authentication/authorization -- N/A (client-side only editor, no auth required) - [x] No `eval()` or `Function()` in production code (only in test file) - [ ] **CSP configured -- FAIL:** No Content-Security-Policy on `index.html` or exported HTML - [ ] **Links use `rel="noopener noreferrer"` -- FAIL** - [x] No dependency files found (no `package.json` with runtime dependencies to audit) --- ## Key Files Referenced - `/Users/yimtaejong/omc-verification/disable-omc/run3/markdown-parser.js` -- Critical XSS vulnerabilities in `parseInline()` (lines 44-85) and link generation (line 59-61) - `/Users/yimtaejong/omc-verification/disable-omc/run3/editor.js` -- `innerHTML` sink at line 117, exported HTML at line 833 - `/Users/yimtaejong/omc-verification/disable-omc/run3/index.html` -- Missing CSP header - `/Users/yimtaejong/omc-verification/disable-omc/run3/style.css` -- No security issues found ## Priority Fix Order 1. **Escape HTML before inline markdown transforms** (Issues #1, #2) -- eliminates all XSS vectors at the root 2. **Add `javascript:`/`data:` URI blocking** in link/image generation (Issue #1) 3. **Add CSP to `index.html`** (Issue #3) -- defense in depth 4. **Add CSP to exported HTML template** (Issue #4) 5. **Add `rel="noopener noreferrer"` to links** (Issue #5)
